hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.env.example|*/.env.example) ;; *.env|*/.env|*/.env.*|.env.*|*/secrets.toml|uv.lock|*/uv.lock) echo 'Blocked: edit .env/.env.* via your editor; regenerate uv.lock with uv lock; secrets.toml is off-limits. (Guards Edit/Write/MultiEdit only, not Bash — this is an accident guardrail, not a security boundary.)' >&2; exit 2;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check --fix "$f";; esac
uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check . && uv run ty check && uv run pytest -q
